source_pr.title: executor: fix unstable test Issue16696

symptoms: The `util/disk` test is unstable when package tests run in parallel because they share a global temp-storage path and leftover files/directories can interfere across runs.
failure_signature: Order-dependent failures caused by shared `TempStoragePath` / leftover temp files in `util/disk` tests when packages run in parallel
root_cause_explanation: `TempStoragePath` is a global config used by temp-storage related code. When package tests run in parallel, sharing the same temp-storage directory (and leaving files from a previous run) can cause cross-test interference and flaky failures. This PR fixes the flakiness by setting `TempStoragePath` to a unique per-run temp dir and explicitly cleaning/recreating that directory before running the check suite.
fix_pattern: Isolate temp-storage state in tests: set a unique `TempStoragePath` (TempDir) and clean/recreate it to avoid cross-test interference from shared directories.

evidence: evidence: PR title: executor: fix unstable test Issue16696
evidence: use a unique temp dir for TempStoragePath + cleanup leftovers before running tests (util/disk/tempDir_test.go)
